title: Refuse `copy.Options.PreserveDigests` in `docker-archive:` (and other transports where it is impossible)
body:
Hello, as per the title, here's my steps:

```
$ skopeo inspect docker://my.registry/foo/bar@sha256:68394b2d21cb73b2ef86b29149e3e1b97d619662f0a35e9bbd62014f2c7a3cd8 | grep Digest -m 1
    "Digest": "sha256:68394b2d21cb73b2ef86b29149e3e1b97d619662f0a35e9bbd62014f2c7a3cd8",
$ skopeo copy --preserve-digests docker://my.registry/foo/bar@sha256:68394b2d21cb73b2ef86b29149e3e1b97d619662f0a35e9bbd62014f2c7a3cd8 docker-archive:my-archive:foo/bar:my-archive
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 949cb00e9eeb done   |
Copying blob 6bd7f4c9f9b3 done   |
Copying blob a87c9cb132ac done   |
Copying blob 8564620f1ca9 done   |
Copying blob bd635e478e6f done   |
Copying blob a9673d869b5a done   |
Copying blob 6e880c714c2b done   |
Copying blob 3c3a064ac0ad done   |
Copying blob 1d04f3755388 done   |
Copying blob be9fc2a15855 done   |
Copying blob 5428f6566eee done   |
Copying blob 43281a5eef5e done   |
Copying config 1ec95189a6 done   |
Writing manifest to image destination
$ skopeo inspect docker-archive:my-archive:foo/bar:my-archive | grep Digest -m 1
    "Digest": "sha256:b64d8cd83311acf6ef458440b6ef19b86db2665525c365093804267811ee3606",
```

Extra info: it's a single-architecture image.

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

`docker-archive` doesn’t _have_ a manifest digest because it doesn’t have a (registry-like) manifest at all. If you want to preserve the original representation of an image, `docker-archive` is entirely unsuitable. (Generally my strong recommendation is to use a registry for all image transfers, not any kind of archive format; registries are significantly more efficient.)

(Sadly, the `docker-archive:` destination is not told about the `--preserve-digests` option and thus has currently no mechanism to object to the use of that option.)

> the `docker-archive:` destination is not told about the `--preserve-digests` option

That could be improved

Just found a similar issue which I didn't spot initially, putting a link here for reference:

https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1440

I understand that this should be done via a registry, thank you. Feel free to close this.
Let’s keep tracking the better reporting when given such inputs, in the code where that would be changed.
